text: Science has a clearer story about registered reports than social media does. Registered reports are research plans peer-reviewed before data collection. This means results aren't cherry-picked. Transparency is key. Studies show registered reports can reduce bias and improve reproducibility. In a world full of misinformation, registered reports shine a light on rigorous science. Want to explore more about how science works? Like and follow for truth in research!
